channel.title: Ezra-Klein on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Ezra-Klein on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Trump has given North Korea “the greatest gift ever”
item.description:
Forget the sensationalist headline, and listen to the podcast episode. Interesting to get the perspective of people with more background then ourselves.

Trump has given North Korea “the greatest gift ever”Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.
